description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a predominantly black exterior and a robust, angular silhouette. The front features a large display screen, a control panel with two sets of joysticks and buttons, and a marquee at the top labeled 'RUBOT Interactive MEGA COLLECTION' in bold red and yellow text. The side panels are decorated with hand-drawn, neon-style graphics in blue and purple, depicting stylized characters, objects, and symbols. The control panel is equipped for two players, each with a joystick and colored buttons, and the cabinet's overall build suggests a sturdy, heavy construction typical of vintage arcade machines. The back panel is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. This cabinet would be a striking and interactive feature in an urban entertainment space, arcade, or retro-themed venue.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with neon-style side graphics, a dual-player control panel, and a bold marquee reading 'RUBOT Interactive MEGA COLLECTION'. The cabinet is sturdy and visually striking, ideal for urban entertainment settings.
description_view_0: Left side view showing blue neon-style graphics of a dragon head, a masked face, a missile, and a character, along with the protruding control panel.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or decorations.
description_view_2: Right side view featuring purple neon-style graphics of a winged object, a stylized 'R', and a disco ball, with the control panel and joysticks partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the screen, dual-player control panel with red and blue joysticks and buttons, and the marquee with 'RUBOT Interactive MEGA COLLECTION' text.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two-player side-by-side layout with two joysticks (red and blue) and multiple colored buttons for each player, arranged in a classic arcade configuration.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features bold red and yellow text 'RUBOT Interactive MEGA COLLECTION' on a black background, with a clean, modern style and no additional imagery.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display neon-style, hand-drawn graphics in blue and purple, including stylized characters, objects, and symbols, giving the cabinet a playful and retro aesthetic.
